mood: Warm, tactile, inviting, and highly functional. It should feel like stepping into a well-lit, premium coffee shop: grounded, rich in texture, without overwhelming visual noise.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dashboard Mode). Base grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-column bento grids for main dashboard views. Tight gap spacing gap-4 or gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous internal padding for containers (p-6, p-8) and generous gaps between sections.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content and tables. Headings left-aligned.

surface_strategy.cards: Clay & Crisp Neumorphism. Background matches surface (#F6F3EC) or pure white (#FFFFFF). 1px solid stroke (border-border or border-amber-900/10) plus a subtle shadow shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(44,36,27,0.04)].
surface_strategy.header: Solid Background with a hard bottom border, or Glassmorphism if floating (bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-amber-900/10).

motion.hover_states: Crisp transitions. hover:-translate-y-0.5 and subtle shadow elevation. Explicit text color changes on hover.
motion.interactions: Micro-interactions for POS buttons (scale down slightly on active state).

components_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#8B5A2B] text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium. Ghost/Secondary buttons: text-[#2C241B] hover:bg-[#8B5A2B]/10.
components_instructions.inputs: Shadcn based. Custom styling: bg-white border border-amber-900/20 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8B5A2B]/20 focus:border-[#8B5A2B] rounded-lg.
components_instructions.tables: Shadcn based. Header text uppercase, small, tracked out (text-xs text-[#8A7D71] tracking-wider). Row hover states: bg-[#8B5A2B]/5.
components_instructions.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use primary (#8B5A2B) and success (#3E5C46) colors for data lines/bars. No grid lines except subtle horizontal axes.

login_background.description: Warm, earthy modern cafe interior. Use for auth/login screen background with a bg-[#2C241B]/40 overlay for text contrast.

dashboard_hero_accent.description: Coffee pouring aesthetic. Can be used in onboarding, settings page headers, or empty states as an aesthetic image.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against earthy backgrounds meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. The primary brand color (#8B5A2B) over white is accessible. Avoid placing white text over light terracotta without a darker overlay.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based, e.g., data-testid='submit-billing-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No default tailwind grays (slate/gray). Use the provided warm earth tones for UI structure.
Do not use Inter for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Figtree' for body text (import via Google Fonts).
Apply 'Clay & Crisp' surface rules to all Shadcn cards: border-amber-900/10, bg-white or bg-[#F6F3EC], subtle shadows.
For the POS/Billing screen, prioritize an efficient bento grid layout with maximum usability for fast data entry (dense but legible).
Use Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for a premium, clean look that fits the cafe theme.
Ensure the float amount (INR 5200) and revenue logic are prominently visible in the Owner dashboard, using Moss Green (#3E5C46) for positive balances.
Every interactive element must have a data-testid for testing.
